no_file_selected: Please select at least one file to translate.
same_source_target_language: Source and target languages must be different.
no_model_selected: Please select a model before starting a translation.
no_provider_connection: Cannot reach the selected provider. Check your settings and try again.
form_invalid: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
api_endpoint_invalid: API Endpoint must be a valid URL.
api_key_required: An API key is required for this provider.
api_key_required_gemini: Gemini API key is required when using Gemini provider.
api_key_required_openai: API key is required when using OpenAI cloud API.
api_key_required_openrouter: OpenRouter API key is required when using OpenRouter provider.
api_key_required_mistral: Mistral API key is required when using Mistral provider.
api_key_required_deepseek: DeepSeek API key is required when using DeepSeek provider.
api_key_required_poe: Poe API key is required. Get your key at poe.com/api_key
api_key_required_nim: NVIDIA NIM API key is required when using NIM provider.
